svg.title: Misa Cybernetic Evolution Layer v0.28 architecture
svg.desc: Measurement-first control loop with two evidence lanes, central measurement quality gate, and observe-only output streams.
svg.text: Measurement-first control loop · Engineering Cybernetics applied to AI agents
no path here without human grant
the v0.28 punchline · was the case file clean?
emit-only · cannot trigger replay, tournament, or block
missing evidence → insufficient_evidence (fails closed, never silently clean)
no measurement → no evolution claim · no clean measurement → no candidate judgment · no human boundary → no live authority
